title: armeria pseudarmeria subsp. sampaioi
intro: Armeria pseudarmeria subsp. sampaioi, also known as Sampaio's thrift, is a rare and lesser-known species of flowering plant in the family Plumbaginaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic activities. The health benefits of Sampaio's thrift include its potential to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, and its aerial parts are also used in herbal preparations, such as tinctures and extracts, although more research is needed to fully understand its uses and effects.
